text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and the academy is buzzing
with excitement. I'm hunkered down in my office
with work, when...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Phew, talk about busy. Welp... at least I can
finally sit down.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss. Mind if I eat here on the tatami mat?
Everywhere else just leaves me antsy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss. Mind if I eat here on the tatami mat?
Everywhere else just leaves me antsy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, ya know. Today's Valentine's Day. I'm
gettin' more chocolate than I can deal with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One turns her attention to the pile of bags
she brought, each stuffed to the brim with
chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful, don't get me wrong. But it baffles me
why they all came to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can imagine why. She's amicable, reliable, and
she exudes natural charm. It makes sense why
many flock to her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ah, whatevz! Savorin' the gifts you're given is
more my style, which means not a single piece
goes uneaten!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good thinkin'! Hot tea to wash down
somethin' sweet! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Inari One begins to eat her Valentine's
Day chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I think this is from one of my partner
runnin' buddies. It's wrapped up all nice and cute,
eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And this is... Wait, it's from the student whose
shelf I fixed! Smells good, but I can't pinpoint the
flavor. Somethin' citrusy, that's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Carefully taking out each gift, Inari One recalls
the person who gave it to her before enjoying the
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I stuffed myself silly! Each one was super
delicious! I definitely gotta do somethin' to repay
everyone!
choice_data_list: I can't believe you remember all those details.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Why wouldn't I? These folks all went outta their
way to give me these, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've eaten them all... that leaves one
more thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Here ya go, Boss. Somethin' from me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Here ya go, Boss. Somethin' from me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One hands me a wrapped present. I peel off
the paper to find a box of traditional Japanese
sweets!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A little gift to repay ya. Sorry that it's not
chocolates, but these are my favorite traditional
treats.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I haven't had enough Western stuff to
know what's good or not, so I went with the safer
option.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: If ya don't wanna eat 'em, that's fine with me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't turn these down for not being chocolates,
not after seeing Inari One show so much care.
After all...
choice_data_list:
Savoring the gifts you're given is more my style,
you know?

Savoring the gifts you're given is more my style,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Can't argue with that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everythin', Boss. ...Really.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everythin', Boss. ...Really.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indulging in Inari One's favorite traditional
sweets, I feel warm and fuzzy inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One hands me a wrapped present. I peel off
the paper to find a box of little chocolate foxes!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A treat for everythin' you've done for me... and
also 'cause it's Valentine's Day.
choice_data_list: Thank you! These are so cute.
Thank you! These are so cute.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well... ya know... I kinda... made 'em myself,
actually.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Well, I did get a lotta help from Creek!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Can't vouch for the taste, though. Don't force
yourself if it's bad, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not that they'd taste bad, but I can't turn these
down, not after seeing Inari One show so much
care. After all...
choice_data_list:
Savoring the gifts you're given is more my style,
you know?

Savoring the gifts you're given is more my style,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to eat these to show my appreciation
toward Inari One, just as she did with her gifts.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Can't argue with that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everythin', Boss. ...Really.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everythin', Boss. ...Really.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relishing the chocolates' mild sweetness, I can
almost taste Inari One's gratitude. My heart melts
at the thought.
